title: Why Crows Gather Around Dead Crows
script_summary: Crows investigate dead crows to learn about potential threats.

segments.voiceover: Why do crows gather around their dead?
It's not a funeral. It's a lesson in survival.
When crows find a dead member, they investigate, alerting others.
Research suggests this behavior helps them learn about dangers in their environment.
So next time you see crows gathered, remember, they're sharing survival tips—not mourning.
Want to uncover more animal mysteries? Follow for more!
